message: 🎨 Good code is like a good joke - if you have to explain it, it's not that good.
all_messages: 🎨 Good code is like a good joke - if you have to explain it, it's not that good.
🧀 Fun fact: Nothing beats a good Roquefort while coding - it's my secret fuel! ☕️
💪 Every expert was once a beginner. Keep coding, keep growing!
